capabilities.label: Product overview
capabilities.user_action: Understand what Aureon is and where to start.

capabilities.label: Repo navigation
capabilities.user_action: Browse all systems and how they relate.
capabilities.safety_gate: Keep generated counts current after major moves.

capabilities.label: SaaS integration
capabilities.user_action: See deploy surfaces, env groups, and auth boundaries.
capabilities.safety_gate: Public endpoints require review before production.

capabilities.label: Local runtime
capabilities.user_action: Start and validate the local operator runtime.
capabilities.safety_gate: Validate env and dry-run/live mode first.

capabilities.label: Operator console
capabilities.user_action: Use the browser console and public artifacts.
capabilities.safety_gate: Runtime data must be redacted before public hosting.

capabilities.label: Trading readiness
capabilities.user_action: Review exchange state, readiness, and action blockers.
capabilities.safety_gate: Live action requires credentials, fresh data, and operator approval.

capabilities.label: Research and evidence
capabilities.user_action: Inspect research, claims, grants evidence, and proof artifacts.
capabilities.safety_gate: Private evidence must be redacted before sharing.

capabilities.label: Grant/funder review
capabilities.user_action: Review Gary/Aureon evidence and funding material.
capabilities.safety_gate: Do not imply unsupported eligibility or submission status.

capabilities.label: Accounting and filing support
capabilities.user_action: Generate and review accounting or statutory support packs.
capabilities.safety_gate: Filing and payment remain manual unless separately authorized.

capabilities.label: Coding and skills
capabilities.user_action: Route code, skill, and desktop handoff work.
capabilities.safety_gate: Code proposals and desktop actions stay review-gated.

capabilities.label: Deployment
capabilities.user_action: Choose and prepare a hosted target.
capabilities.safety_gate: Pick one target and store secrets outside git.

capabilities.label: Validation
capabilities.user_action: Run checks and prove the map remains navigable.
capabilities.safety_gate: Checks must match the capability being claimed.

capabilities.label: Archive and provenance
capabilities.safety_gate: Archive is history, not current product copy.
